data.title: Enphase Energy Stock Is Diving Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Enphase Energy Inc (NASDAQ:ENPH) shares are trading lower Wednesday after the company reported worse-than-expected financial results for the third quarter. The selloff has accelerated Wednesday morning as multiple analyst firms downgraded or slashed price targets on the stock.

data.title: What's Going On With VinFast Auto Stock Wednesday?
data.description: VinFast Auto shares are relatively flat in premarket trading today. Yesterday, the company reported 21,912 EV deliveries for Q3, a significant increase from previous periods.

data.title: Starbucks Halloween-Themed 'Wicked' Drinks Hit Stores Alongside New Movie Merch Amid Weak Q4 Prelim Results
data.description: These themed drinks were made available from Oct. 22 in the U.S., Canada, and select international locations.

data.title: Lithia Motors Q3: Earnings Beat Estimates, New Store Acquisitions Expand Market Reach Across Luxury Segments In Florida
data.description: Lithia Motors reported Q3 adjusted EPS of $8.21, exceeding estimates, while expanding its market presence in Florida through new acquisitions.

data.title: Tesla Stock Faces Selling Pressure Ahead Of Q3 Earnings: 4 Takeaways From The Chart
data.description: Tesla stock is currently down 12.26% YTD, but technical indicators suggest a bearish trend. Can buying pressure turn things around?
